title: WPCWorld
description: Adds unique artifacts, custom materials, and a blend of technology and magic.
body:
## Description

WPCWorld is my first Minecraft mod. It adds magic and technology, many new ores, artifacts, and a progression system. Future updates will include new dimensions, bosses, structures, items, and unique mechanics.

### Inspired by: 
Concepts from Avaritia, Industrial Craft 2, and Modern Industrialization.

### Development Notice:
This mod is currently in active development. Bugs, unfinished features, and incomplete or imperfect translations may be present. Content, balance, and mechanics are subject to change in future updates.

## Info and Terms
Required Dependencies: Fabric API only.

Compatibility:
Fully compatible with [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) and [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei).
The mod provides proper recipe integration and display support for both mods.
![Custom Furnaces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13364c86efd8fb0ba40e82eaf056c65f8c8c6754.png)
